settings.heading: Details & Materials
settings.content: 420 GSM heavyweight fleece. Independent Trading Co. IND420XD blank. DTG printed graphic. Pre-shrunk cotton-polyester blend.

settings.heading: Sizing
settings.content: True to size. For an oversized fit, size up one. See our Size Guide for detailed measurements.

settings.heading: Shipping & Returns
settings.content: Free shipping on orders over $100 CAD. Printed on demand — please allow 5–10 business days for production plus shipping. All sales final on printed-to-order items.
